item.title: I love dogs
item.description: I have been loudly and abnoxiously stubborn about what time I take breaks for the past 11 years. Here is the dog in question
item.dc:creator: corberator

item.title: Can't beat the algorithm
item.description: I guess the algorithm makes all the calls... Edit: ...and it did in my favor for once! 1st time viral. Thank you my dearest imgurians, I have lurked for years and I really love the community here :) If you liked the video and want more or simply want to support me: https://www.youtube.com/@mikesorrentinomusic
item.dc:creator: MutineerAndroids

item.title: This is Ace the 2 legs boy and he is a real fighter :)
item.description: He doesn't even know that he has only 2 legs. He thinks he's normal. I think he's absolutely fine the way he is. He's happy, healthy, well taken care of, and he moves around like a champion! Source: https://www.instagram.com/musubiyori www.youtube.com/musubiyori

item.title: I would watch a "Highlander" movie with Sir Patrick Stewart. And the Borg. Written by whomever wrote "Men in tights"
item.dc:creator: soogyeboogye

item.title: WTF? Horse Sees Zebra
item.description:
Barrel racer Mikayla Murphy captured amusing footage of her horse Ginger’s reaction to seeing a zebra for the first time.
Later Ginger got to meet the zebra face-to-face. Ginger remained guarded, even though the zebra was very friendly. https://www.tiktok.com/@equinemik
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.dc:creator: WoofWoof21

item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 19
item.dc:creator: MrsPrendsen

item.title: To the King
item.description: In 2018 Bernard Hill went to Wales Comic Con, and I wrapped up Theoden’s sword Herugrim, and flew across the ocean to meet him. I was stopped at the front door by security who had concerns about the sword. After reaching an agreement with security that they would accompany me to the signing table, and that if for any reason I removed the sword from it’s case, I would be ejected from the event, I was brought to Bernard Hill’s table. Upon seeing the sword, Bernard’s eyes lit up, he grinned, and he immediately grabbed it and started swinging it around with delight-much to the chagrin of the security members around us! It was one of the best moments I’ve ever had with an actor, and he will be deeply missed ❤️
item.dc:creator: screwed101

item.title: Graaaiiiinnsss...
item.description: Hello Imgurian! Thank you for the accolade! Did you know that Bruce Lee had a vegetarian brother? He was called Brocco Lee. Yeah, definitely not the best...... ✨
